name: kafka-evidence-ui
description: Evidence-first dual-mode design system for information-dense frontend work.

interface.longDescription: Design and refactor dashboards, catalogs, monitoring tools, and public-data interfaces using KAFKA2306's evidence-first terminal and paper modes.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the existing interface before changing it.
Choose terminal or paper mode from the information context.
Expose sources, freshness, counts, and unresolved evidence.
Use the KAFKA Evidence UI tokens and validation checklist.
